name: Sim: Flight Operations - 4-hour delay with no updates on ZA606
scenario_description: Flight delayed 4+ hours due to maintenance without passenger notification. Gate agents provided no information. Passenger missed connecting flight.
complaint_description: Flight ZA606 departing Denver was held at the gate for over four hours on March 9 2026 due to an unscheduled maintenance check. No announcements were made at the gate and the app never updated from Delayed. I missed my connecting flight to Los Angeles and had to book a hotel overnight at my own expense. I am requesting full reimbursement of the $380 hotel stay plus meal vouchers, and a formal explanation of why no customer communications were issued.
